docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER COURT MINUTES OF 04/19/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLEPER, ALEKSANDR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-26-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-29-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFT. WAS NOT FOUND. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE LEFT." (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KLEPER, ALEKSANDR AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MARK

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY KLEPER, ALEKSANDR AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-09-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-29-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER---YANINA GOTSULSKY. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $850.00 TODAY FOR PLAINTIFF'S DISMISSAL. IF NO APPEARANCE ON APRIL 29, 2013 BY EITHER PARTY, THEN MATTER IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE" PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
